tagline: Monitor your product's critical endpoints and cron jobs from your phone.
target_user: Indie hackers, solo founders, and small developer teams running APIs, web apps, or scheduled jobs.
problem: Small teams discover downtime too late because many monitoring tools are desktop-first, noisy, or too expensive for tiny products.
solution: A mobile-first monitoring companion that shows endpoint health, cron freshness, SSL expiry, and incident notes in a lightweight dashboard.
feature_v1: Manual HTTP health checks and latency snapshots
Offline cache of latest known status
monetization: Free tier for a few projects, then subscription or one-time Pro unlock for unlimited projects and cloud backup.
privacy_notes: Do not claim guaranteed uptime prevention.
Add a privacy policy before enabling analytics, backup, or notifications.
Keep data collection minimal in the first release.

screens.title: Overview
screens.description: See the latest status for key endpoints, cron jobs, and certificates in one glanceable dashboard.

screens.title: Projects
screens.description: Group checks by product or client to keep monitoring organized and actionable.

screens.title: Incidents
screens.description: Capture downtime notes, recovery details, and follow-up tasks without leaving your phone.
